products.title: First Care Activating Eye Serum
products.body_html:
A ginseng-powered eye serum that visibly firms, brightens, and de-puffs for a smoother, revitalized eye contour. The latest edition to Sulwhasoo’s iconic First Care ritual, First Care Activating Eye Serum is a revitalizing daily step designed to visibly firm, brighten, and refresh the delicate eye area. 

The target treatment delivers a triple-action approach to visible renewal. A 3-Peptide Blend helps improve elasticity and reduce the look of under-eye bags, while the Ginseng Caffeine™ Complex visibly minimizes puffiness. Vitamin C derivatives brighten the appearance of dark circles for eyes that look more awake and energized. 

The cooling Ceramic Tip Massager enhances the application with a refreshing, instant cooling sensation that helps improve circulation, further soothing and refining the under-eye area.  

Daily use helps reveal brighter eyes and a rested, more youthful look, carrying the legacy of First Care into a step created exclusively for the eyes. 

KEY INGREDIENTS
Ginseng PHA™, Niacinamide
Korean herb extract, 3-peptide blend, Ginseng Caffeine™ Complex

WORKS BEST FOR
All skin types

products.title: UV Wise On-The-Go Sun Cushion
products.body_html:
A Portable SPF 50+ cushion that hydrates, soothes, and delivers cooling UV protection with a smooth texture that layers seamlessly over and under makeup.

This skincare‑infused sun cushion delivers lightweight, breathable protection with a smooth, refined finish. The formula hydrates, soothes, and re‑applies seamlessly over or under makeup for effortless coverage throughout the day. 

Formulated with five types of hyaluronic acid, squalane, and antioxidant‑rich botanicals including white ginseng and mulberry complex, it helps replenish moisture, support the skin barrier, and maintain a balanced, luminous complexion. Korean Herb Extract adds additional skin‑nourishing comfort, making sun protection feel like skincare.

The micro‑porous puff ensures even application and a smooth glide, allowing for seamless reapplication throughout the day. With each use, skin stays protected, hydrated and refreshed, while makeup remains intact—making sun care effortless and enjoyable anytime, anywhere.

KEY INGREDIENTS
Five Types of Hyaluronic Acid, Squalane, and a hydrophilic, micro-porous puff disperses formula evenly for a smooth glide and precise application

WORKS BEST FOR
Normal, Dry, Combination, Oily Skin

products.title: Lumiwise Discoloration Corrector
products.body_html:
A precision spot treatment that targets persistent dark spots that resist fading, restoring clarity and even tone. Clinically proven to reduce visible pigmentation for brighter, more uniform-looking skin. 

Powered by MELASOLV™, White Ginseng Saponin infused Ginseng Spicule, and Lumiquinone Capsule™, the formula helps fade stubborn pigmentation, prevent future discoloration, and support smoother texture and renewed radiance in the treated areas. 

With a lightweight cream-serum texture that absorbs quickly, this corrector integrates seamlessly into your brightening ritual. With continued use, stubborn spots appear lighter, the tone looks more even, and skin reveals a refined, luminous clarity. 
*Instrumental result, 33 women 

KEY INGREDIENTS
Melasolv™, Ginseng Spicule, Lumiquinone Capsule™, Angelytics Enzyme

WORKS BEST FOR
For normal, dry, combination skin types

products.title: Lumiwise Brightening Ampoule Serum
products.body_html:
An intensive brightening serum delivering deep brightening and real results. Powered by advanced ginseng science, it corrects visible dark spots today while strengthening the moisture barrier for luminous, even-toned skin tomorrow.

At its core is Ginseng Ectoin™, a proprietary complex of ginseng-derived polysaccharides and Ectoin, paired with Niacinamide to enhance clarity, calm visible irritation, and reinforce the moisture barrier. Together, they help restore and maintain a smoother, more even complexion with renewed luminosity.

The silky, fast-absorbing texture melts into skin without heaviness, making it ideal for daily use. Clinically proven to visibly reduce dark spots, improve brightness, and strengthen barrier resilience, Lumiwise Brightening Ampoule Serum delivers powerful results for long-term radiance.

KEY INGREDIENTS
Ginseng Ectoin™, Niacinamide

WORKS BEST FOR
For normal, dry, combination skin types

products.title: Lumiwise Brightening Essence Water
products.body_html:
Your brightening ritual begins here. This ultra-light essence smooths and prepares skin to correct today’s visible dullness while strengthening clarity for tomorrow. Clinically shown to promote clearer, more radiant skin with daily use.

Formulated with Ginseng PHA™, a blend of ginseng extract and mild exfoliating acids, and clarity-enhancing Niacinamide, this essence works to brighten your complexion, correcting signs of dullness today while strengthening skin for lasting radiance. It helps improve visible brightness, smooth uneven texture, and support a more even-looking tone over time.

With continued use, skin feels hydrated and supple, appears smoother and clearer, and looks naturally radiant. Designed to complement and enhance the performance of the brightening formulas that follow, this essence elevates your daily ritual, addressing dullness today while preparing skin for well-aging clarity.

KEY INGREDIENTS
Ginseng PHA™, Niacinamide

WORKS BEST FOR
All skin types

products.title: The Ultimate S Infusion Treatment
products.body_html:
The Ultimate S Infusion Treatment delivers a transformative four-week ritual that mirrors the skin’s natural renewal rhythm. Each week introduces a new formula, designed to purify, activate, restore, and strengthen. With continued use, skin appears visibly lifted, firmer, and more radiant, with a noticeable reduction in wrinkles and improved elasticity.

Week 1 – Purify:  
Infused with White Ginseng Enzyme™, the first formula gently exfoliates and refines skin’s surface, promoting healthy turnover, revealing renewed clarity, smoother surface and a luminous, fresh-faced glow.

Week 2 – Activate:  
The second formula introduces Infusion Dual Capsule technology in a dynamic formula that enhances resilience and awakens skin vitality. Texture is visibly refined, and suppleness is restored.

Week 3 – Restore:  
Enriched with Ginseng Berry SR-Intensosome™, the third formula helps visibly lift skin while reviving and restoring its vitality. Elasticity is replenished, and the appearance of fine lines and sagging is diminished, revealing a renewed, youthful bounce.

Week 4 – Strengthen:  
The final fortifying phase is infused with Ginseng Oleosome™ to replenish and revitalize skin, protecting against signs of visible aging and helping to preserve youthful integrity.

Each week, the skin is visibly transformed, firmer, smoother, and more radiant, culminating in a complexion redefined by resilience and vitality.

WORKS BEST FOR
For normal, dry, combination skin types

products.title: Concentrated Ginseng Rejuvenating Cleansing Foam
products.body_html:
A skin-cushioning cleanser that transforms into a rich, moisturizing foam. Enriched with Ginseng Amino Complex™ and Dual Elastic Bubble Technology, it gently purifies while leaving skin refreshed, hydrated, and comforted from the first use.

Indulge in a rejuvenating cleanse that elevates your everyday ritual. Concentrated Ginseng Rejuvenating Cleansing Foam begins as a velvety cream and transforms into a cloud-like lather that gently cushions the skin with delicate micro-bubbles. Infused with Ginseng Amino Complex™, Korean Ginseng Actives (Ginsenomics™), and Ginseng Peptide™, this advanced formula sweeps away makeup, sunscreen, and impurities while supporting the skin’s moisture barrier and awakening the skin’s natural luminosity.

Our Dual Elastic Bubble Technology creates dense, moisture-rich bubbles that glide effortlessly across the skin, minimizing friction for a gentle, comforting cleanse. As impurities dissolve, skin feels refreshed and deeply hydrated, revealing a clarity and radiance that reflect Sulwhasoo’s decades of ginseng expertise.

With continued use, the complexion appears smoother and softer, and more vibrant, restoring the look of healthy, luminous skin. Complete your ritual with First Care Activating Serum and the Concentrated Ginseng Rejuvenating Collection for unparalleled transformation. 

WORKS BEST FOR
All skin types

products.title: Perfecting Cushion
products.body_html:
A breathable, lightweight cushion foundation with SPF 46 that blurs imperfections and enhances natural radiance for an even-toned, semi-matte finish.

Each compact contains one pre-inserted cushion and one refill puff sealed in a protective pouch.   

Infused with Korean Herb Extract, the hero ingredient of our iconic First Care Activating Serum, and powered by SlimFitCover™ Technology, the Perfecting Cushion Foundation combines broad-spectrum UV protection with luminous, flawless coverage. Its featherlight texture melts into the skin, delivering buildable, semi-matte perfection that hydrates, balances, and enhances natural radiance. Encased in a sculptural compact inspired by mother-of-pearl, the case shimmers with a soft, iridescent glow, embodying timeless beauty.

products.title: Essential Firming Cream EX Mini
products.body_html:
A rich, whipped cream that delivers lasting hydration while visibly firming and smoothing skin. It supports the barrier for a radiant and plumped look. 

Experience deep hydration and visible firming benefits with Essential Firming Cream—your daily solution for youthful, resilient skin. As the skin’s first sign of aging is moisture loss, this rich, whipped moisturizing cream is designed to restore hydration while delivering intensive firming care to target early signs of visible aging. 

Formulated with Korean Herb Extract and the JISUN Firming Complex™, this cream visibly improves elasticity, smooths fine lines, and strengthens the skin’s moisture barrier. A calming 3-herb blend—White Mulberry, Jujube, and Chinese Skullcap—works in harmony with these actives to soothe and support skin health. 

Clinically shown to deliver 72-hour hydration* and visibly improve elasticity with continued use, this cream provides a dual-action effect: immediate moisture replenishment and cumulative firming benefits day after day. 

Dermatologically and hypoallergenic tested, it’s ideal for all skin types. Use daily as the final step in your well-aging ritual for visibly firmer, smoother, and more radiant skin. 

*Instrumental result, 32 women  

KEY INGREDIENTS
Hydra Capture Complex™, Herbal Extract Blend (Raspberry Fruit, Mulberry Leaf, Mountain Yam, Cocoa)
30% Skin Conditioning Oil Blend (including Olive Oil), HydroLeo Technology™, Ginseng Berry, Ectoin

WORKS BEST FOR
All skin types
Dermatologically and hypoallergenic tested

products.title: Essential Revitalizing Water EX
products.body_html:
This refreshing water-gel toner delivers deep, lasting hydration while enhancing visible firmness, elasticity, and clarity. 

Experience the renewed Essential Revitalizing Water—your first step to visibly radiant, youthful-looking skin in just four weeks. 

Formulated with Korean Herb Extract, a proprietary blend of five botanical ingredients, it helps strengthen the moisture barrier, soothe visible signs of irritation, and smooth the look of fine lines. These effects are enhanced by the Sulwha Revitalizing Complex™, which features Plum Blossom Extract to help support the skin’s natural resilience. Lightweight yet deeply nourishing, this toner absorbs comfortably and delivers hydration up to 10 layers deep*.

Clinical results show significant improvements in hydration, soothing, and barrier repair—even after physical and chemical irritation. 
 
*Hydration analysis on stratum corneum samples taken from 10 sequential tape-stripping. 

KEY INGREDIENTS
Sulwha Revitalixing Complex™,  Korean Herb Extract (Peony, Lotus Seed, Solomon’s Seal, White Lily, and Rehmannia), and Plum Blossom Extract.

WORKS BEST FOR
All skin types

products.body_html:
This silky emulsion delivers 24-hour hydration* while visibly firming and smoothing skin. It calms signs of irritation and reinforces the moisture barrier for a radiant, balanced complexion. 
*Instrumental result, 33 women 

Experience the comforting power of Essential Revitalizing Emulsion—your next step to balanced, radiant skin. 

Powered by Korean Herb Extract, a proprietary blend of five botanical ingredients, and the Sulwha Revitalizing Complex™, it helps reinforce the skin’s moisture barrier and calm visible signs of irritation. Amplifying results of this potent complex is Plum Blossom Extract, to support and protect skin’s natural resilience. 
Clinical results show significant improvements in hydration, soothing, and barrier repair—even after physical and chemical irritation. 

Dermatologist- and hypoallergenic-tested, it’s an essential step in your well-aging ritual. 

KEY INGREDIENTS
Sulwha Revitalixing Complex™,  Korean Herb Extract (Peony, Lotus Seed, Solomon’s Seal, White Lily, and Rehmannia), and Plum Blossom Extract.

WORKS BEST FOR
For normal, dry, combination, and oily skin types
Dermatologically and hypoallergenic tested

products.title: The Ultimate S Enriched Cleansing Foam 15mL
The Ultimate S Enriched Cleansing Foam
products.body_html:
Recapture skin’s youth with every cleanse. This luxurious dual-action oil-in-foam cleanser and mask  transforms your routine into your daily spa moment—deeply cleansing while providing moisture and radiance. Powered by HydroLeo Technology™, Ginseng Berry, and a 30% blend of skin-conditioning oils, it cleanses thoroughly without stripping, revealing nourished, healthy-looking skin. Clinically proven to hydrate and revitalize after just one use*, it’s more than a cleanser—it’s a restorative ritual that leaves skin soft and luminous every time you cleanse. 

HydroLeo Technology™: 
Inspired by mille-feuille pastry layers, this proprietary science locks nourishing oils between layers of water to form a dense, foamy lather, delivering a deep yet delicate cleanse that comforts, conditions, and protects. 

KEY INGREDIENTS
30% Skin Conditioning Oil Blend (including Olive Oil), HydroLeo Technology™, Ginseng Berry, Ectoin

SOLUTION FOR
Dryness,  Uneven Texture, Pores

WORKS BEST FOR
For normal, dry, combination, and oily skin types

products.title: Concentrated Ginseng Rejuvenating Cream Rich
products.body_html:
A lush cream powered by Korean Ginseng Actives and Ginseng Peptide™ to support skin’s self-rejuvenating power and improve the look of fine lines and wrinkles.

Our upgraded formula reimagines our iconic anti-aging cream, infusing it with Retinol. This luxuriously dense, ultra-rich cream quickly absorbs to deliver lasting hydration, improve the look of pores, refine skin texture, and diminish the look of fine lines and wrinkles. Your skin will feel nourished, rejuvenated, and undeniably radiant.

products.title: Perfecting Lip Color
products.body_html:
This tinted lip balm, enriched with Sulwhasoo's signature Ginseng extract and a blend of Jojoba and Glycerin, delivers nourishing hydration to your lips. The lip balm features an innovative Dual Layer Moisture Technology combining lip serum with 5% plant-derived glycerin to deeply moisturize and achieve smoother looking lips. Available in 6 buildable shades, it features our proprietary Ultrafine Pigment Process Technology for uniform, vibrant color and comfortable wear.

KEY INGREDIENTS
Sulwhasoo Master Complex™, Ginseng Seed Oil, Natural Plant-Derived Blend

BEST FOR 
Nourishing, hydrating, and moisturizing lips

SOLUTION FOR 
Dryness, dullness, and uneven texture

This lip balm features a proprietary Moisture-Wrapping Technology that strengthens the lip barrier while delivering 24-hour* comfort. Visibly plumps, softens and diminishes the look of lip wrinkles. Indulge in its velvety texture for a silky-smooth, sumptuous finish.
